blended.narrative: Teton Pass Ski Area is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 8 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,568 ft. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.7" of snow, highs of 33°F, gusts to 45 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 5" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: overcast, highs of 51°F, gusts to 46 mph.

recent_conditions.narrative: 4.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 4" over the past week. Current depth: 27".
